title: Implement wrap-aware is_fresher and bounds checks in Rust LOADng/gradient
description: Update hybrid.rs, gradient.rs, loadng.rs to use new SeqNum for freshness in RouteCache/GradientTable equivalents, RREQ/RREP processing. Align exactly with Python _is_seq_fresher and rank logic. Add bounds validation for seq, hop_limit, metric.
